title: 4pcs Metal Hanging Flower Pots With Drainage Hole Balcony Flower Bucket Wall Planter Garden Planters with Detachable Hook for Balcony Fence Decor (Yellow)
features: 🌷DIMENSIONS & COLOR: Diameter Top :10cm ; Diameter Bottom : 8cm ; Height: 10cm; Total height: 16cm (Including hook). Color: Yellow.
🌷STURDY & DURABLE: Made from iron. Sturdy enough, not easy to be bent, more safely. Weather Resistant, suitable for using in outdoor environments.

🌷UNUSUAL DESIGN: These plant pots come with removable hook. The hook allows the flower pot to hang safely in place at an ideal vantage point. Depending on it's position, this planter is great for upright or trailing plants.
🌷DRAINAGE HOLE: Lack of drainage can lead to a whole host of plant problems, every hanging planter has a drainage hole, so you can be assured your plant’s always in a good home.

🔥APPLICABLE: The flower pot can be hung on the balcony, fence, window, railing or even a washing line. Suitable for various flowers and plants, such as potted plants, tasty herbs, dried flowers, seedlings.
description: Product Description 4pcs Metal Iron Flower Pot Balcony Garden Plant Planter Do you want to bring nature indoors? Add a pop of color to exterior walls and fences with this beautiful hanging flower pot. Ideal for brightening up dull brick walls and sheds with your favorite flowers or plants. Making an attractive focal point on your balcony, especially if you plant brightly colored flowers. Kind Tips Due to the shooting and light, the physical and photos are slightly color difference, please forgive me Specification Size and Quantity Size : 8*15.5*10cm/3.1*6.1*3.9in (the total height of the second height plus the hook handle) Quantity : 4PCS/SET Simple Use ,Decorate life installation steps The hook handle can be removed, easy to install, easy to use Outdoor decoration The hook flower pot is used for outdoor decoration, exquisite and elegant Indoor storage Used for indoor storage stationery, jewelry, key, coin change, etc., which is convenient for jingzhi This special design can be hung on the balcony, window, railing, anywhere in the room. Mini and compact size, space-saving, easy to use.
